steps.title: Identify what the passage shows about Flanagan
steps.content: The passage outlines two achievements connected by the word also: Flanagan created jobs for over 12,500 theater professionals, and she made theater accessible by lowering ticket prices so many people could experience it for the first time.

steps.title: Analyze the choices against Flanagan's achievements
steps.content:
Choice D states that Flanagan succeeded in creating many jobs and introducing people to theater.
The other three don't capture the full picture—A focuses solely on creating employment without mentioning accessibility, B explains why the FTP was created rather than what Flanagan accomplished, and C identifies an affordability problem rather than its solution.
That matches choice D — D is correct.
